titleStmt.title: SII 20.200: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 200. (B.K. No. 13 of 1937-38.) BHAṬGUṆKI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the pial in front of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the year Śārvari, Jyēshṭha śu. Monday, Solar eclipse. The Śaka year is lost except the last digit which is 2. Śārvari corresponds with Śaka 1162 but the existing details are irregular. The paksha given, viz., S11uddha is apparently wrong because of the mention of the solar eclipse. Again, in the month of Jyēshṭha of the given year there was no eclipse at all. The tithi also is lost. In the previous month however, i.e. Nija-Vais'ākha, both the lunar and solar eclipses occurred on Monday, the 7th and Wednesday, the 23rd respectively in May, A.D. 1240. The intended date seems to be A.D. 1240, May 23.
The inscription mentions Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati Bommeyanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyaThe letter vē is written above the line.
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . © . nāganā
nayayīśanoppida Eṁna kulasvāmiyoppida mahi
nāgabhūsaṇanoppida Eṁnāḷdaṁ śrīnāganātha yi
. svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pra
vartti śrī śiṁghaṇadēvavijeyarājya ṣakavaru
2 neya sārvvari saṁvatsara jyēṣṭha suddha
sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇadalu . samasta
śrīmanu mahapradhānaṁ sēnādhipati
ṣākya nīticāṇakya niyōgayōgaṁdhara
siṣṭajanaciṁtāmaṇi siṁghaṇadēvarā
srī boṁme yanā ykanuṁ saparivāra The letters me and nā are written above the line.
ḍiyali The stone
Digital edition of SII 20.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
